meta.title: How It Works — HUGGO | Onboarding in 4 Steps
meta.description: See how HUGGO works in 4 simple steps. From a photo of your menu to a live WhatsApp assistant, in minutes.

hero.title: From zero to live in minutes.
hero.subtitle: No app to install. No developer to hire. Four steps, and your WhatsApp assistant takes its first orders.

steps.title: Find your store.
steps.description: HUGGO locates your business on Google Business. Your address, hours, photos — everything is pulled automatically.

steps.title: Import your products.
steps.description: Two options: take a photo of your menu — the AI reads it and builds your catalog. Or sync directly from your POS to keep the catalog always up to date.

steps.title: Your assistant is built.
steps.description: AI configures a personalized WhatsApp assistant for your store. It knows your products, prices, and hours. It's ready to serve your customers.

steps.title: Your customers start ordering.
steps.description: Your WhatsApp number goes live on Google Business. Your customers find you, scan your QR code, and order directly. Word of mouth does the rest.

demo-conversation.title: This is what your customers experience.
demo-conversation.placeholder: Visual simulation of a WhatsApp conversation to provide.

basket-360.title: One basket. Every channel.
basket-360.description: Your customer adds a product on WhatsApp. In store, they update their order on the kiosk or iPad. They pay at the counter. The basket is the same, everywhere, in real time.
basket-360.channels: WhatsApp → In-store kiosk → iPad → POS → Website → Payment (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Stripe, Contodeo)
basket-360.note: HUGGO plugs into your existing POS. No hardware change, no migration. Compatible with the major POS systems on the market via HubRise and Orisha Distribution.

items.label: customer base digitized in 3 months — even non-tech-savvy

items.question: Do I need a developer to set this up?
items.answer: No. Four steps, no technical skills. Photo of your menu, POS sync, and your assistant goes live. No developer needed.

items.question: What if my POS isn't compatible?
items.answer: HUGGO connects to the major POS systems on the market via HubRise and Orisha Distribution. If your POS is listed on HubRise, connection is automatic.

items.question: How will my customers know they can order on WhatsApp?
items.answer: HUGGO automatically publishes your number on Google Business. A QR code for in-store display is generated. Your regulars discover it with their first order and spread the word.

final-cta.title: Convinced? Take the next step.
final-cta.subtitle: Request your demo — 15 minutes to see HUGGO in action for your store.
